review_questions: Does the presentation registry cover every interaction message, reject unknown message refs, and record validate/generate action treatment?
Is shared component reuse justified by semantics, operations, state, information hierarchy, and interaction model rather than visual similarity, and do layout pattern refs bind to the registry?
Does natural-language layout remain the canonical semantic authority while inventory is only an index and validation skeleton?
Do desktop, tablet, mobile, mobile iOS, and mobile Material carrier rules preserve width, scroll, safe-area/system-bar, keyboard, and platform constraints?
Is the containment hierarchy multi-level and coupled to ordering, scroll behavior, and overlay entry/return context?
Does layout preserve full information access under height constraints, bind required information refs to known sources, and respect width constraints without unauthorized horizontal scroll?
Does z-axis layering include Material elevation intent, blocking behavior, preserved background context, focus restoration, and resolvable surface refs?
Does P2-IMPL-03 avoid adding new pages, secondary workflows, live product output, or external integrations?
